input_preview:
claim: NVIDIA and Google are leading 800 VDC adoption ahead of schedule, with small-volume shipments starting around Q3 2026; Vertiv and Delta are relevant suppliers.
evidence_span: NVIDIA describes 800 VDC as next-generation power distribution for AI factories and lists electrical ecosystem partners including Delta and Vertiv.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: nvidia.com
source_url: https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/technologies/800-vdc-architecture/

claim: A seven-stock European photonics basket maps to CPO, InP lasers, silicon photonics, glass processing, and AI data-center optical interconnect themes; the stock basket itself is implied to be investable.
evidence_span: LPKF says its LIDE technology enables glass processing for advanced semiconductor packaging from ramp-up to high-volume manufacturing.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: lpkf.com
source_url: https://www.lpkf.com/en/news-press/press-releases-teaser/lpkf-is-ready-for-increasing-demand-for-glass-substrates-in-the-semiconductor-industry

claim: The AI equity cycle moved from NVIDIA to memory/AMD, then to semiconductor equipment names such as LRCX, AMAT, and KLAC.
evidence_span: NVIDIA reported record Q1 FY2027 revenue and data-center revenue, showing AI data-center demand as the main operating driver.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: nvidianews.nvidia.com
source_url: https://nvidianews.nvidia.com/news/nvidia-announces-financial-results-for-first-quarter-fiscal-2027

claim: The AI equity cycle moved from NVIDIA to memory/AMD, then to semiconductor equipment names such as LRCX, AMAT, and KLAC.
evidence_span: AMD's IR materials describe Q1 2026 as driven by accelerating AI infrastructure demand and data-center growth.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: ir.amd.com
source_url: https://ir.amd.com/financial-information/financial-results

claim: Hyperscalers are spending heavily on AI data centers, NVIDIA captures the first revenue/profit wave, and memory becomes a next bottleneck.
evidence_span: Micron prepared remarks say data-center revenue exceeded $25B and DRAM/NAND demand significantly exceeds supply.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: investors.micron.com
source_url: https://investors.micron.com/static-files/631b1a32-5537-46ae-8f40-82e42fc79dfe

claim: Roundhill launched DRAM as a pure memory ETF in April 2026, bundling memory names such as Micron, SK hynix, Samsung, SanDisk, Western Digital, and Seagate; social posts also cite large YTD gains.
evidence_span: MarketWatch describes the Roundhill Memory ETF as recently launched and notes rapid gains and volatility in the memory-chip sector.
source_class: auditable_secondary
source_domain: marketwatch.com
source_url: https://www.marketwatch.com/livecoverage/stock-market-today-dow-s-p-500-nasdaq-tech-sell-off-oil-prices-us-waiving-oil-sanctions-iran/card/why-this-red-hot-etf-has-wall-street-worried-about-big-swings-in-the-memory-chip-sector-WtBf3NlDs1VkTYKJ7sjs

claim: AI compute hardware bottlenecks are moving into low-loss materials, orthogonal backplanes, glass substrates, and CPO; this creates a structural investment window.
evidence_span: Sivers/GF collaboration supports optical connectivity architectures including CPO and LPO for data-center interconnects.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: sivers-semiconductors.com
source_url: https://www.sivers-semiconductors.com/press/sivers-globalfoundries-advance-ai-data-center-optical-solutions/

claim: TSMC moved glass substrate development from lab toward production validation with Ibiden and Innolux, extending CoWoS for AI chips.
evidence_span: TSMC annual material discusses advanced packaging and 3D stacking, including CoWoS and photonic-engine roadmap work.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: investor.tsmc.com
source_url: https://investor.tsmc.com/static/annualReports/2025/english/index.html

claim: Many SPY/QQQ retail investors entered after 2020 and may underestimate drawdowns, making index DCA psychologically riskier than they expect.
evidence_span: SEC investor resources warn about stock recommendations and investment decision-making based on social media.
source_class: regulatory_warning
source_domain: investor.gov
source_url: https://www.investor.gov/introduction-investing/general-resources/news-alerts/alerts-bulletins

claim: Many SPY/QQQ retail investors entered after 2020 and may underestimate drawdowns, making index DCA psychologically riskier than they expect.
evidence_span: Vanguard frames trust and behavioral coaching as core to helping investors stay aligned with long-term goals and feelings.
source_class: institutional_research
source_domain: advisors.vanguard.com
source_url: https://advisors.vanguard.com/advisors-alpha

claim: Many SPY/QQQ retail investors entered after 2020 and may underestimate drawdowns, making index DCA psychologically riskier than they expect.
evidence_span: SEC's social-media investing alert warns investors to treat online investment information carefully and verify sources.

source_url: https://www.sec.gov/investor/alerts/socialmediaandfraud.pdf

claim: Finviz provides screening, heatmaps, technical/fundamental filters, and insider-transaction style discovery useful for U.S. equity research.
evidence_span: Finviz provides an S&P 500 map interface.
source_class: primary_tool_page
source_domain: finviz.com
source_url: https://finviz.com/map

claim: Claude's stock analysis is better than most retail investors because it removes emotional buy-high/sell-low bias through disciplined prompts.
evidence_span: SEC investor resources warn against relying solely on social-media stock recommendations.
source_class: regulatory_warning
source_domain: investor.gov
source_url: https://www.investor.gov/introduction-investing/general-resources/news-alerts/alerts-bulletins

evidence_span: Marvell COMPUTEX 2026 page says Matt Murphy delivered The Future of AI Scaling Depends on Connectivity and discussed critical links in modern AI data-center infrastructure.

claim: The AI equity cycle moved from NVIDIA to memory/AMD, then to semiconductor equipment names such as LRCX, AMAT, and KLAC.

claim: A broad AI supply-chain basket across semis, memory, optics, data centers, and energy contains the next tenbagger candidates.

source_class: primary_official
source_domain: abc.xyz
source_url: https://abc.xyz/investor/events/event-details/2026/2025-Q4-Earnings-Call-2026-Dr_C033hS6/default.aspx

source_class: primary_official
source_domain: investors.micron.com
source_url: https://investors.micron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/micron-technology-inc-reports-record-results-third-quarter

claim: Hyperscaler capex has risen sharply and may pressure free cash flow; a social post cites a Nomura-style chart claiming FCF for AMZN/MSFT/GOOG/META/ORCL is nearing zero while S&P 500 is at highs.
evidence_span: Micron remarks state DRAM and NAND demand significantly exceeds supply.
source_class: primary_official

source_url: https://investors.micron.com/static-files/631b1a32-5537-46ae-8f40-82e42fc79dfe
